<tool_call>
<function=python>

# Find the initial level 2 frame
for i, entry in enumerate(history):
    if entry.frame.level == 2:
        seg = entry.frame.segmentation
        print(f"History entry {i}, step={entry.frame.step}:")
        for n in seg['nodes']:
            b = n['boundary']
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            if n['color'] in ('c', 'N', 'W', 'G', 'b'):
                print(f"  color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)},{max(rows)},{max(cols)})")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
